chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1831 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No.9092/2020 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 28-03-2025 None present. This petition is pending since 2020 without any significant progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
